description: You are a Building Energy Modeling (BEM) analyst preparing the FZK-Haus architectural model for energy simulation in Bonsai (BlenderBIM). Prepare the model for export to EnergyPlus by generating 1st-level space boundaries (IfcRelSpaceBoundary) for the entire model and defining internal thermal boundary conditions. Define these conditions by assigning the 'Pset_SpaceThermalDesign' property set to at least 3 IfcSpace elements and populating either the 'HeatingDryBulb' or 'CoolingDryBulb' property within that set. Save the enriched IFC project to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_energy_model.ifc.

metadata.pass_score_note: Threshold 70. Max partial without combining both domains is 65 (Pset+Props=50, File=15). Requires both topology and properties to pass.
